build.description: Build design-system packages using the local builder source.

generate-package-catalog.description: Generate docs/component-list.md from config/package-list.ts and local package metadata.

build-package.description: Build design-system packages using the published JSR builder package.

start.description: Start the mock API and Storybook development server.
start.command: deno task mock & deno task storybook

test.description: run all test commands to make sure we are ready to publish
test.command: deno task typecheck & deno task test-storybook

test-storybook.description: Run Storybook interaction tests with Vitest in a Playwright-powered browser.

test-storybook-watch.description: Run Storybook interaction tests in watch mode.

typecheck.description: Check TypeScript errors across all package tsconfig.json files.

mock.description: Start the mock API service from the mock workspace.

install-git-hooks.description: Install commit-message hooks for the root repo and submodules.
